title: LVMH stock drops as analysts flag luxury recovery 'party postponed' amid Iran war
summary_full: There was a deterioration of demand in March as a result of the Middle East conflict, said LVMH CFO Cécile Cabanis.
summary_public: There was a deterioration of demand in March as a result of the Middle East conflict, said LVMH CFO Cécile Cabanis.
